prompt: DevBoss scheduled eval continuation: agenda-first Todoist tasking from injected prompt; use gh admin auth first, avoid old per-repo keys, and safely test end-to-end-loop on available target repos with read-only/dry-run evidence.
commands_or_evidence: Todoist CLI was not present on PATH in this cron shell; used the injected DevBoss scheduled prompt as agenda source.

gh api user and gh auth status -> authenticated as tiddeman83; exact gh repo view calls for tiddeman83/bloonbladmaker, tiddeman83/tdrrecherche, and tiddeman83/Schoolanalyse still returned GraphQL 'Could not resolve to a Repository'.
Local target availability: /opt/data/worktrees/tdrrecherche/feat-complete-wordpress-design-samples exists; no target .end-to-end-loop memory files present there.
tdrrecherche state: branch feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples, HEAD bde99b7, git status clean, HTTPS origin https://github.com/tiddeman83/tdrrecherche.git.
git ls-remote --heads origin and git remote show origin -> 403 Write access to repository not granted; old per-repo key was not used.
node --check wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/js/theme.js plus extracted inline scripts from index.html and prototypes/variant-a..e -> exit 0 for all checked scripts.
HTML parser audit over index.html and prototypes/variant-a..e -> 0 missing relative assets, 0 missing anchor targets, 0 duplicate IDs; 10 forms still use prototype action '#'.

Focused form accessibility audit -> optional phone controls in index.html variants A-D and prototypes/variant-a..d are placeholder-only with no name/aria-label/label; variant E did not show that issue.
python3 -m http.server 4173 smoke -> HTTP 200 for /, /prototypes/variant-a/, /prototypes/variant-d/, theme JS, and theme CSS.
Credential-like scan for GitHub tokens, private keys, and wp-config password patterns -> 0 hits.
php command not found, so PHP syntax/runtime validation for the WordPress theme remains blocked.
gh extension list returned no installed extensions; Copilot code review was not run because this was a read-only/no-diff eval and no safe gh-copilot review path was exposed.
